title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Kansai Nerolac

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Kansai Nerolac
jsonLd.description:
We at Kansai Nerolac are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kansai Nerolac:
Kansai Nerolac is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kansai Nerolac!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
